text: Plaintiff, a 24-year IBM veteran, alleges an algorithmic hiring/rehire screening tool blocked his rehire at age 48, constituting age discrimination. Filed as Swanson v. International Business Machines Corporation in the Western District of Texas on 2026-05-23. The precise technical nature of the tool (machine-learning vs. rules-based) is not yet established on the public record.
ai_system_name: Unnamed IBM algorithmic hiring/rehire screening tool
canonical_source_conflicted: ADEA and applicant-specific rehire eligibility records
mitigation_gap: Alleged absence of meaningful human review of an automated rehire-eligibility screen and no disparate-impact safeguard against age-based exclusion.
reliance_or_harm: Plaintiff alleges denial of rehire after 24 years of prior IBM employment, attributed to an automated screen.
